headline: Is It Time To Revisit American Express (AXP) After Recent Share Price Weakness?
summary: If you are wondering whether American Express at around US$300 per share offers fair value, a premium price, or a potential opportunity, this article breaks that question down in plain terms. The stock has a mixed return profile, with a 2.0% gain over the last 7 days, a 6.5% decline over 30 days, and a 19.4% decline year to date, set against longer term returns of 9.9% over 1 year, 90.3% over 3 years, and 124.8% over 5 years. Recent coverage has focused on American Express as an established...

headline: Dave Ramsey Was Blunt With Wife Who Found Husband’s $18K Secret Debt: ‘No Wonder He’s Pissed’
summary: Separate bank accounts in a marriage can quietly become a system where one partner funds $18,000 in credit card debt at 30% interest while the other has no idea it exists. That is exactly what one caller described on The Ramsey Show’s March 18 episode, "Stop Letting Dumb Decisions Control Your Financial Future." Dave Ramsey’s ... headline: American Express and STAUD Launch Limited-Edition Collection to Celebrate 60 Years of the Gold Card
summary: NEW YORK, March 26, 2026--In celebration of the American Express® Gold Card’s 60th anniversary, American Express has partnered with STAUD on a limited-edition resortwear collection inspired by modern travel and the experiences that define the Gold Card. The eight-piece collection, including select unisex styles, is available starting today on staud.clothing and in stores.
